metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.17 extends CC_ENSLAVER_LANG=en to Imperial Edicts (圣旨) injection + DENY reason for full bilingual closure, fixes Windows portability (drive-letter path regex + UTF-8 stdout), and refreshes the comprehensive README to v0.17 (6→7 Stop gates, Layer (g) bullet, /cc-enslaver:edict, repo tree, env-vars table).
